# Changelog

## 0.1.0 -- 2026-06-06

### Added

- OKLch color palette generation via `--direction`
- Portable `DESIGN.md` theme system
- Skill folders (`--skill article|briefing|changelog|deck`)
- Anti-slop quality gate (`--strict`)
- RSS/Atom feed generation
- Watch mode with auto-rebuild
- TOC sidebar (`--toc` / `--no-toc`)
- Mermaid diagram support
- Reading time estimation + Open Graph meta tags

### Fixed

- `--template` crash regression
- Empty slug edge case
- Dark mode CSS glitches in brutalist theme

---
